The '''Warlord Dropship''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] used for large ground operations.

==Characteristics==
The largest [[Dropship/Legends|dropship]] used by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], the Warlord Dropship measured 110 meters in length, dwarfing other Imperial dropships. Produced by [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]], the Warlord Dropship was capable of transporting up to 360 troops and up to 180 metric tons of cargo, or a [[Armor platoon|platoon]]<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref> of 4 [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]], in addition to a crew of 200.<ref name="WC" />

Each dropship was protected by thick armor plating and six double [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons. In atmospheric descent, a Warlord Dropship could achieve 1,200 kilometers per hour in descent and 800 kilometers per hour in ascent.

Because of its size, the dropship required an [[Ablative heatshield|ablative shield]] to withstand drop temperatures. The shield had to be replaced after each drop, which required at least two hours in a well equipped [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] bay.

==Appearances==
